overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character in ancient robes exploring a moonlit classical city. The character ascends a grand stone staircase and walks along a waterfront terrace with Greco-Roman architecture, fire braziers, and statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with fire braziers approaching grand staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through stone plaza toward a grand staircase lined with burning braziers

entered.detail: large stone bowl with flames providing warm orange light against the blue night
ancient stone building with columns and statues on the roof visible in the distance
wide stone staircase leading up to the upper terrace
tall dark green tree silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open stone plaza illuminated by fire braziers. The cool blue night sky contrasts with the warm torchlight as the character approaches a grand staircase leading to an elevated classical temple.

scene_state.functional_zone: ascending grand staircase with stone railings

events.description: begins ascending the wide stone staircase
npc guard in armor passes by on the left side descending the stairs

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand staircase toward the upper terrace, passing stone railings and statues

notable_agents.action: armored guard walking down the stairs carrying a bow

entered.detail: decorative stone balustrade with lattice pattern on the left side of stairs
decorative stone balustrade on the right side of stairs
row of white marble statues standing on the roof of the temple at the top

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand staircase flanked by stone railings. An armored guard passes by on the left walking downward. White marble statues become visible atop the temple roof ahead as the character climbs higher.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper terrace walkway with waterfront view and distant obelisk

events.description: reaches top of stairs and transitions to open terrace with waterfront view
turns slightly right to follow the waterfront path

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper terrace with view of water and distant city lights

notable_agents.action: guard walking ahead on the path toward the colonnaded building

entered.detail: intricate geometric patterned stone tiles at the top of the stairs
tall stone obelisk with glowing fires at its base visible across the water
body of water reflecting moonlight and distant city lights

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the character emerges onto a wide terrace with intricate mosaic flooring. The view opens to reveal a waterfront with a tall obelisk in the distance. The character turns right to follow the path alongside the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront walkway approaching colonnaded building with statue

events.description: approaching colonnaded building with large winged statue in courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking along cobblestone path toward a colonnaded building with a large central statue

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor walking ahead toward the colonnaded entrance

entered.detail: long building with row of columns and lit interior visible through openings
monumental winged statue on pedestal in front of the colonnaded building

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the waterfront cobblestone path, approaching an impressive colonnaded building with a large winged statue in its courtyard. A guard walks ahead toward the entrance as the moon shines through scattered clouds above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a torchlit plaza up into an elevated temple complex overlooking a moonlit waterfront. It begins in an open stone plaza where warm fire braziers contrast with a cool blue night sky as the character approaches a grand staircase. As the character ascends the stairs, the perspective shifts upward past a descending armored guard toward white marble statues crowning the temple roof. The scene then opens onto a wide terrace with intricate mosaic flooring, revealing a distant obelisk and a sprawling waterfront before the camera turns right to follow the coastal path. Finally, the movement continues along the cobblestones toward a colonnaded building and a large winged statue, while the moon shines through scattered clouds above.
